query: Review this repository for security issues before I merge.
expected_behavior: Identifies the stack and scopes the review to the relevant/changed files
Walks the vuln categories from references/vuln-categories.md (injection, access control, crypto, headers, secrets)
Emits findings[] with area:security, a SEC-*/OWASP-A0* ruleId, file:line, message and a concrete suggestion
Sets [GATE] when at least one critical or high finding exists

query: Is this endpoint safe? It loads an invoice by id from the route and returns it.
expected_behavior: Checks for authentication on the endpoint and authorization/ownership of the invoice object (IDOR)
Flags missing object-ownership checks as SEC-AUTHZ with critical/high severity
Proposes a concrete fix that enforces ownership server-side

query: Check this data-access code for SQL injection.
expected_behavior: Traces user input into the query sink (FromSqlRaw/string concatenation)
Flags string-built SQL as SEC-SQL (critical) and recommends parameterized/FromSqlInterpolated form
Does not flag already-parameterized queries (avoids false positives)
